name: Brikor Limited
summary: Brikor Limited, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and supplies building and construction materials in South Africa. The company operates through Bricks and Coal segments. It is involved in the provision of plaster bricks and semi-face clay bricks; and coal mining operations. The company serves customers in housing, residential, commercial, industrial, civil engineering, and infrastructure projects. Brikor Limited was incorporated in 1998 and is based in Nigel, South Africa.
